info.name: OfferGo Mobile API
info.description:
Complete API collection for OfferGo ride-hailing app.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:5000)
2. Run **User → Auth → Login** → the token auto-saves to `userToken`
3. Run **Driver → Auth → Login** → the token auto-saves to `driverToken`
4. All protected requests use those tokens automatically.

**Real-time:** open folder **Ride Chat (REST) + Socket.IO** for trip chat (`chat:send` / `chat:message`) and driver negotiation events (`ride-negotiation-*`). REST chat endpoints are also listed there.

item.name: 🗺️ COMPLETE TRIP FLOW (Run in order)
item.description:
Execute these requests in sequence to simulate a full trip from booking to payment.
Step numbers guide the exact order for both USER and DRIVER sides.

exec: var r = pm.response.json(); if(r.success && r.data && r.data.token){ pm.collectionVariables.set('userToken', r.data.token); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', r.data.user.id); }

var r = pm.response.json(); if(r.success && r.data){ pm.collectionVariables.set('bookingId', r.data.booking_id); pm.collectionVariables.set('rideId', r.data.booking_id); console.log('booking_id saved:', r.data.booking_id); }

response.name: 201 — Booking Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking created",
  "data": {
    "booking_id": 123,
    "status": "pending",
    "bookingType": "normal",
    "scheduledAt": null,
    "totalAmount": 32.50,
    "currency": "SAR",
    "distanceKm": 9.0,
    "paymentType": "cash",
    "tripOtp": "4821",
    "vehicleCategory": { "id": 1, "name": "Sedan", "nameAr": "سيدان" },
    "from": { "lat": "24.7136", "lng": "46.6753", "address": "King Fahd Road, Riyadh" },
    "to":   { "lat": "24.7800", "lng": "46.7200", "address": "Olaya District, Riyadh" },
    "createdAt": "2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

item.name: 4 · User: (Optional) Start Negotiation — propose lower fare

request.description: OPTIONAL. Skip this if user accepts the system price. Driver will see the proposed fare.

exec: var r = pm.response.json(); if(r.success && r.data && r.data.token){ pm.collectionVariables.set('driverToken', r.data.token); pm.collectionVariables.set('driverId', r.data.user.id); }

item.name: 7 · Driver: Get Available Rides (sees user's booking)

response.name: 200 — Available Rides

request.description: Direct accept — no negotiation needed. Ride status → accepted. Socket event sent to rider.
Use this OR 8A (not both). Driver counter-offers, ride status → negotiating.
Poll this every few seconds. Returns all driver offers (bids, counter-offers, and direct accepts).

response.name: 200 — Direct Accept
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Driver offers received",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 22,
      "name": "Ali Hassan",
      "offeredPrice": 32.50,
      "basePrice": 32.50,
      "isDirectAccept": true,
      "vehicleType": "Toyota Camry",
      "carColor": "White",
      "carPlate": "ABC 1234",
      "rate": 4.8,
      "distanceKm": 0.5
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Locks in the driver. Ride status → accepted. tripOtp returned — share with driver to start trip.
Only needed if driver sent a counter-offer (8B). Locks the negotiated fare.
Call every few seconds while moving. Emits socket event driver-location-for-ride to rider.
Ends trip. Creates Payment record. If cash: credits driver wallet immediately. If gateway: payment stays pending.

item.name: 💬 Ride Chat (REST) + Socket.IO
item.description:
During a trip, **use Socket.IO for live chat** (instant `chat:message`). REST is for history, read receipts, unread badge, and optional send fallback.

**Trip state (driver + rider):** listen for **`driver-trip-sync`** (driver room) and **`trip-sync`** (ride room after `subscribe-ride`). Payload matches GET `/apimobile/driver/negotiation/status/:id` plus `syncReason`, `syncedAt` — use this instead of polling when the socket is connected.

**Socket.IO:** same host as `baseUrl`, path `/socket.io` (unless server uses `SOCKET_PATH`). Pass JWT via `auth.token` or `Authorization` header per your app.
1. `join-user-room` / `join-driver-room` with your numeric user id (negotiation + notifications).
2. `subscribe-ride` with `{{rideId}}` before expecting chat events.
3. Send: emit `chat:send` `{ "rideRequestId": <number>, "message": "text", "attachmentUrl": null }`.
4. Listen: `chat:message`, `chat:read`, `chat:typing`, `chat:error`.
5. Read: emit `chat:read-ack` `{ "rideRequestId": <number> }` or use REST POST `.../read` below.

**Negotiation (driver):** also listen for `ride-negotiation-accepted`, `ride-negotiation-rejected`, `ride-negotiation-counter`.

request.description: Rider or assigned driver. Switch Authorization to `driverToken` for driver. Pagination: use `cursor` from `nextCursor` for older pages.
Persists and broadcasts `chat:message` to room `ride-{id}`. Prefer socket `chat:send` during the trip for lower latency.
Creates a new rider account (unverified). OTP sent via SMS. Use the returned token in submit-otp.

response.name: 201 — Registered

request.description: Login with phone + password. Token is auto-saved to `userToken` variable.
Flutter: get idToken from google_sign_in package then send it here. Auto-creates account if new.
Flutter: get accessToken from flutter_facebook_auth package then send it here.
Step 1 of password reset. Returns a temporary token. Use it in Authorization header for reset-password.

response.name: 200 — OTP Sent

request.description: Verifies OTP. Sets isVerified=true. Must be called after register before user can login.

response.name: 200 — Verified
201 — Created
400 — Missing fields
422 — No pricing rule
201 — Shipment Booking Created
201 — Scheduled
422 — Too soon

request.description: Cancels the booking. Ride disappears from all driver listings immediately. Driver is notified via socket if already assigned.

response.name: 400 — Trip already started

request.description: Server emits `ride-negotiation-accepted` to the assigned driver's Socket.IO room (`join-driver-room`) so the driver app can update without polling.
Server emits `ride-negotiation-rejected` (with `rejectedBy`) to driver + rider rooms.

item.name: تفاصيل الشكوى + ردود الإدارة — Get Complaint Detail

response.name: 200 — التفاصيل

request.description: Registers driver. Status = pending until admin approves.

response.name: 201 — Registered

request.description: Token is auto-saved to `driverToken` variable.
Toggles between online and offline. No body needed.

response.name: 200 — Went Online

request.description: Returns nearby pending ride requests. pricing.realPrice = km × service rate.
Direct accept. No proposedFare = no negotiation. Ride immediately assigned.

Driver proposes a price. Rider gets `ride-negotiation-offer`. Driver: use Socket.IO `join-driver-room` and listen for `ride-negotiation-accepted` / `ride-negotiation-rejected` / `ride-negotiation-counter`; GET below is optional fallback.

response.name: 200 — Offer Sent

request.description: Optional fallback if socket disconnected. Status: pending | accepted | rejected | expired. Prefer real-time events on `join-driver-room`.

item.name: تقديم شكوى على الراكب — File a Complaint
تفاصيل الشكوى + ردود الإدارة — Get Complaint Detail

response.name: 200 — التفاصيل

item.name: عدد الإشعارات غير المقروءة — Unread Count (badge)
🚘 Dedicated Bookings (Mobile)
item.description: Private/dedicated booking endpoints used by the mobile developer and dashboard page `/dedicated-bookings`. Run Pricing first, then Create Dedicated Booking to save `dedicatedBookingId` for the rest of the requests.

request.description: Use this in mobile before creating a dedicated booking to prefill baseFare and pricePerHour.
Creates a dedicated/private booking. Response may include clientSecret for payment confirmation.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": {{userId}},
  "vehicleCategoryId": {{vehicleCategoryId}},
  "pickupAddress": "Cairo Airport Terminal 3",
  "pickupLat": 30.1119,
  "pickupLng": 31.4139,
  "dropoffAddress": "Nile Ritz-Carlton, Cairo",
  "dropoffLat": 30.0459,
  "dropoffLng": 31.2326,
  "bookingDate": "2026-05-10",
  "startTime": "2026-05-10T09:00:00.000Z",
  "durationHours": 6,
  "baseFare": 100,
  "pricePerHour": 75,
  "notes": "Please wait near gate 4.",
  "promotionCode": ""
}

request.description: Cancels booking and applies the configured cancellation/refund flow.
Driver-only endpoint. Returns future PENDING/APPROVED bookings without an assigned driver.
Driver-only endpoint. Assigns the current authenticated driver to the booking.
Completes the booking, captures payment if configured, and generates invoice.
Admin/fleet protected endpoint.
Cannot delete ACTIVE bookings.
